title: ToastContainer
description: Singleton container where toasts fired by the useToast() composable appear. Mount it once near the root and push notifications from any component.

error.title: Error / danger
error.desc: For network errors, failed validation or any blocking state.

info.title: Info pinned
info.desc: Passing duration: 0 keeps the toast anchored until the user dismisses it or you call dismiss().

warning.title: Warning with action
warning.desc: Add an inline action button — useful for 'Undo', 'Review' or 'Retry'.

dismissAll.title: Dismiss all
dismissAll.desc: Push multiple toasts at once, then clear the entire queue with dismissAll().

props.max: Maximum number of visible toasts; older ones are evicted.
props.defaultDuration: Default duration in ms for toasts without a duration.
props.defaultVariant: Default variant applied to push() calls.
props.offset: Distance in px from the viewport edge.

types.title: ToastContainer
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for the toast system. Includes ToastInput, ToastAction, ToastColor and ToastPlacement types for configuring ephemeral notifications.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus into the toast container when toasts are present
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaStatus: Uses role status to announce toast messages to screen readers
a11y.ariaLive: Announces toast content changes to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaAtomic: Announces the entire toast content as a single unit
a11y.focusNative: Toasts are focusable for keyboard dismissal
a11y.focusDismiss: Each toast has a dismiss button that is focusable and keyboard-activatable
